passive.name: Signature of the Visionary
passive.description:
Hwei primes enemy champions he damages with his abilities for his signature finishing touch.

Hitting an enemy with a second damaging spell completes his signature, leaving it beneath them. The signature detonates after a short delay, dealing magic damage to all enemies in range.

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Hwei's''' damaging [[champion ability|abilities]] mark enemies hit for 4 seconds. Subsequent damaging abilities against marked targets consume the mark to create an explosion beneath them, dealing {{as|{{pp|35 to 180}}|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 35% AP)}} {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} to enemies in the area after a {{fd|0.85}}-second delay.
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|285|Center of marked champion to edge of other units}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The ability that consumes the mark cannot apply it on the same {{tip|cast instance}}.
* The mark '''cannot''' be triggered from the same cast instance of an ability, even if the triggering ability was empowered by ''{{ai|Stirring Lights|Hwei}}''.
* The explosion occurs around the marked target from where they were when the ability damaged them to consume the mark.
** In other words, the explosion is at the location of where they were hit, not where they are at the end of the delay.
*** The target who had their mark consumed is able to escape the area of the explosion within the delay period.
* Enemies can be damaged by multiple explosions at once.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will block both the mark and its consumption as well as the detonation.
* The indicator for the effect telegraphs an unusually smaller radius than it actually hits.{{bug|1}}
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Hwei}} damaging abilities mark enemies hit for a short time. Damaging them with a different ability consumes the mark to create an explosion at their location that deals {{as|magic damage}} in an area.

Q.name: Subject: Disaster
Q.description:
Hwei envisions a series of disasters, allowing him to paint a devastating blow.

This ability replaces Hwei's abilities with damaging abilities: Devastating Fire, Severing Bolt, and Molten Fissure.
Q.tooltip:
Hwei paints visions of disaster that deal large damage to enemies.

Devastating Fire
Hwei launches a blazing fast fireball that explodes on the first enemy hit, dealing {{ tooltip_qqdamage }} plus {{ tooltip_qqbonusdamage }}% max health magic damage.

Severing Bolt
Hwei strikes over far distances with a delayed lightning bolt, dealing {{ tooltip_qwdamage }} magic damage. Hitting an Isolated or Immobilized target increases the damage up to {{ tooltip_qwbonusdamage }} magic damage, based on the target's missing health.

Molten Fissure
Hwei unleashes a path of eruptions, dealing {{ tooltip_qedamage }} magic damage in an area and leaving behind pools of lava that Slow enemies by {{ spell.hweiqe:slowpercent }}% and deal {{ tooltip_qedamagepersecond }} magic damage per second for {{ spell.hweiqe:duration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Hwei''' enters a disastrous mood, gaining access to its abilities as well as ''{{ai|Wash Brush|Hwei}}''. He will exit the mood upon casting any of them.
wiki_detail.cdstart: Starts upon using a basic ability
wiki_detail.blurb:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Hwei''' enters a disastrous mood, gaining access to its abilities as well as ''{{ai|Wash Brush|Hwei}}''. He will exit the mood upon casting any of them.
* ''{{ai|Devastating Fire|Hwei}}'' (QQ)
* ''{{ai|Severing Bolt|Hwei}}'' (QW)
* ''{{ai|Molten Fissure|Hwei}}'' (QE)

W.name: Subject: Serenity
W.description:
Hwei envisions a series of serenities, allowing him to paint invigorating settings.

This ability replaces Hwei's abilities with utility abilities: Fleeting Current, Pool of Reflection, and Stirring Lights.
W.tooltip:
Hwei paints visions of serenity that provide utility for himself and allied champions.

Fleeting Current
Hwei launches a current of swift waters in a line that grants allies {{ tooltip_wqmovespeed }} Move Speed.

Pool of Reflection
Hwei forms a protective pool that grants {{ tooltip_wwshieldamount }} Shields over time to allied champions inside reduced by {{ spell.hweiww:tooltipallymod*100 }}% for allies.

Stirring Lights
Hwei creates three swirling lights that empower his next three Abilities or Attacks to deal an additional {{ tooltip_weonhitdamage }} magic damage and restore {{ tooltip_weonhitmanarestore }} Mana each.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Hwei''' enters a serene mood, gaining access to its abilities as well as ''{{ai|Wash Brush|Hwei}}''. He will exit the mood upon casting any of them.
wiki_detail.cdstart: Starts upon using a basic ability
wiki_detail.blurb:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Hwei''' enters a serene mood, gaining access to its abilities as well as ''{{ai|Wash Brush|Hwei}}''. He will exit the mood upon casting any of them.
* ''{{ai|Fleeting Current|Hwei}}'' (WQ)
* ''{{ai|Pool of Reflection|Hwei}}'' (WW)
* ''{{ai|Stirring Lights|Hwei}}'' (WE)

E.name: Subject: Torment
E.description:
Hwei envisions a series of torments, allowing him to paint controlling visages.

This ability replaces Hwei's abilities with crowd control abilities: Grim Visage, Gaze of the Abyss, and Crushing Maw.
E.tooltip:
Hwei paints visions of torment that control enemies.

Grim Visage
Hwei launches a terrifying face that causes the first enemy hit to Flee for {{ tooltip_eqfleeduration }} second(s) and take {{ tooltip_eqdamage }} magic damage.

Gaze of the Abyss
Hwei forms an eye that lingers and provides vision locking onto the first enemy champion that enters and launching a homing missile that Roots the first enemy hit for {{ tooltip_ewrootduration }} seconds dealing {{ tooltip_ewdamage }} magic damage.

Crushing Maw
Hwei paints a set of jaws at a target location that Drags enemies to the center dealing {{ tooltip_eedamage }} magic damage and Slowing enemies caught by {{ tooltip_eeslowamount }}% decaying over 1.25 seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Hwei''' enters a tumultuous mood, gaining access to its abilities as well as ''{{ai|Wash Brush|Hwei}}''. He will exit the mood upon casting any of them.
wiki_detail.cdstart: Starts upon using a basic ability
wiki_detail.blurb:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Hwei''' enters a tumultuous mood, gaining access to its abilities as well as ''{{ai|Wash Brush|Hwei}}''. He will exit the mood upon casting any of them.
* ''{{ai|Grim Visage|Hwei}}'' (EQ)
* ''{{ai|Gaze of the Abyss|Hwei}}'' (EW)
* ''{{ai|Crushing Maw|Hwei}}'' (EE)

R.name: Spiraling Despair
R.description: Hwei paints a vision of pure despair. The first enemy champion struck becomes the center of an expanding painting that slows and damages nearby enemies. The vision explodes after reaching its maximum size or when the champion dies.
R.tooltip:
Hwei launches a vision of pure despair that sticks to an enemy champion for {{ duration }} seconds. The vision expands over time applying a Slow to enemies for {{ slowpercentperstack }}% stacking every 0.25 seconds, and dealing {{ damageovertime }} magic damage per second.

Upon completion, the vision shatters, dealing {{ damage }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Hwei''' launches a globule of pure despair in the target direction that collides with the first enemy {{tip|champion}} hit, afflicting them with an [[aura]] that grows over 3 seconds, {{tip|true sight|reveals}} the target, and grants {{tip|sight}} within its radius. Enemies within are both dealt {{as|magic damage}} and applied a stack of ''Despair'' every {{fd|0.25}} seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Magic Damage per Tick|{{ap|10/4 to 30/4}} {{as|(+ {{ap|5/4}}% AP)}}|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|10*3 to 30*3}} {{as|(+ {{ap|5*3}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Despair:}} For each stack, the target is {{tip|slow|slowed}} by 10% for {{fd|0.25}} seconds, stacking up to 12 times.
wiki_detail.description3: At the end of the duration or when the target dies, the aura explodes to deal {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within and remove all ''Despair'' stacks from affected enemies.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|200 to 400}} {{as|(+ 80% AP)}}|Maximum Total Damage|{{ap|200+10*3 to 400+30*3}} {{as|(+ {{ap|80+5*3}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description4: ''Spiraling Despair can only be cast if '''Hwei''' has not entered a mood.''
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|1340|1300 missile travel distance plus 40 to-edge radius check if nothing has been hit yet}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Applies {{tip|persistent area damage}} for the aura and deals {{tip|area damage}} for the explosion.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} can block the aura, explosion, and the application of the first ''Despair'' stack.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Hwei}} launches a globule in the target direction that collides with the first enemy {{tip|champion}} hit, afflicting them with an [[aura]] that grows over a few seconds. Enemies within are continually dealt {{as|magic damage}} and gradually {{tip|slow|slowed}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: After the duration ends or when the target dies, the aura explodes to deal {{as|magic damage}} to all enemies within.
